params.name: author
params.description: Filter results to quotes by this exact author name.

params.name: genre
params.description: Filter results to quotes tagged with this genre.

params.name: query
params.description: Full-text search across quoteText, quoteAuthor, and quoteGenre.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of random quotes to return.

items.docs:
Returns one or more randomly selected quotes, optionally filtered by author, genre,
and/or a full-text search query. When `count` is supplied, that many random quotes
are returned (default 1).

params.name: author
params.description: Filter results to quotes by this exact author name.

params.name: genre
params.description: Filter results to quotes tagged with this genre.

params.name: query
params.description: Full-text search across quoteText, quoteAuthor, and quoteGenre.

params.name: page
params.description: One-indexed page number for paginated responses.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per page.

items.docs:
Returns a paginated list of quotes, optionally filtered by author, genre, and/or a
full-text search query. Supports standard `page` and `limit` query parameters.

params.name: page
params.description: One-indexed page number for paginated responses.

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of records to return per page.

items.docs: Returns the master list of all genres present in the corpus.

items.docs: Returns the master list of all authors present in the corpus.
